initial_entry.name: Modular Theme Dashboard
initial_entry.author: 栗子仁儿
initial_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. A modular, free-layout dashboard for Obsidian with 10 widgets, 8 themes, and infinite instancing support.

current_entry.author: 栗子仁儿
current_entry.description: Featuring freely draggable, resizable and auto-save dashboard modules. The built-in multi-format file viewer supports direct preview of office, media and code files. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

initial_entry.name: Monolithos
initial_entry.author: silas-zhen
initial_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. An AI companion for local-first thinking. Crystallize notes into structured memory, summon AI inline with Cmd+J, transform writing into podcasts and presentations — all inside your vault.
